title: The Dangerous Moment
writer: Douglas Z. Doty, William Clifton, John Colton
actors: Carmel Myers, Lule Warrenton, George Regas
plot: Sylvia Palprini is a waitress at The Black Beetle, the leading bohemian café in New York City's Greenwich Village. Among the eclectic customers is artist George Duray, whom she admires from a distance. A jealous suitor, Movros Tar...
